sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂוכו שׂכה שׂוכה

Transliteration: śôkôh śôkôh śôkô

Phonetic: so-ko'

BDB Definition:

Shocho or Shochoh or Sochoh or Shoco or Socoh = "bushy"
  1. a town in the lowlands of Judah
  2. a town in the mountain district of Judah

Origin: from H7753

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
